case_title: JEREMIAH LOWERY VS. CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-04-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-04-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT.PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JULIUS WILSON - PROPERTY SUPERVISOR AND GRIVEZ MORA-ROGERS-SITE DIRECTOR.NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. FIOL. NOT REPORTED. (506).
